matches.summary: PlayStation 5 unit sales in the United States dropped 58% year on year in May, according to Circana, reaching their lowest May total since 2000. Xbox unit sales, meanwhile, reached their lowest ever recorded figures for May, dropping 12% year on year.
matches.title: PlayStation hardware sales fall to their lowest May total since 2000 | US Monthly Charts
